requirement_topic.en: URA and Utility Grid-Connection Review - IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: URA及公用事业并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: URA及公用事業併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Vanuatu's electricity sector is regulated by the Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA), with grid operations handled through concession utilities including UNELCO in Port Vila and Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure (VUI) on other concession networks. Publicly confirmed PV-inverter-specific national standards are limited, so grid-tied inverter acceptance is normally driven by URA-regulated utility connection review, project-owner specifications, French / IEC legacy practice, and lender or EPC requirements. For grid-connected PV inverters, project submissions should include IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, with inverter firmware, voltage/frequency protection thresholds, reconnection delays, and commissioning settings validated for Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz network. Vanuatu shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but its nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
summary.zh: 瓦努阿图电力部门由Utilities Regulatory Authority（URA）监管，电网运营由特许公用事业承担，包括维拉港的UNELCO以及其他特许网络的Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure（VUI）。公开确认的光伏逆变器专门国家标准有限，因此并网逆变器接受通常由URA监管下的公用事业接入审查、项目业主规格、法国/IEC传统实践以及融资方或EPC要求决定。并网光伏逆变器的项目提交文件应包括IEC 62116防孤岛证据和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据，并将逆变器固件、电压/频率保护阈值、重连延迟和调试设置针对瓦努阿图230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行验证。瓦努阿图与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准。
summary.zht: 萬那杜電力部門由Utilities Regulatory Authority（URA）監管，電網運營由特許公用事業承擔，包括維拉港的UNELCO以及其他特許網路的Vanuatu Utilities and Infrastructure（VUI）。公開確認的光伏逆變器專門國家標準有限，因此併網逆變器接受通常由URA監管下的公用事業接入審查、項目業主規格、法國/IEC傳統實務以及融資方或EPC要求決定。併網光伏逆變器的項目提交文件應包括IEC 62116防孤島證據和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據，並將逆變器韌體、電壓/頻率保護閾值、重連延遲和調試設置針對萬那杜230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證。萬那杜與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Utilities Regulatory Authority (URA) electricity-sector regulatory context
UNELCO / VUI utility grid-connection and project technical review
Vanuatu low-voltage grid basis — 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 for grid-connected PV inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid conditions and domestic grid-operator acceptance. They are not automatically accepted by URA, UNELCO, VUI, or Vanuatu project owners as IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence, and they do not prove that firmware settings have been validated for Vanuatu's 230/400 V network.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述文件针对中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网条件和国内电网运营商验收准备，不会被URA、UNELCO、VUI或瓦努阿图项目业主自动接受为IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据，也不能证明固件设置已针对瓦努阿图230/400 V电网验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。上述文件針對中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網條件和國內電網運營商驗收準備，不會被URA、UNELCO、VUI或萬那杜項目業主自動接受為IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據，也不能證明韌體設置已針對萬那杜230/400 V電網驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for Vanuatu project-level utility acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the specific inverter model, document the Vanuatu utility or project settings loaded into firmware, and validate protection thresholds at 230/400 V, 50 Hz. Because Vanuatu is a cyclone-prone Pacific SIDS market, commissioning files should also document enclosure rating, corrosion protection, surge protection, mounting, thermal derating, spare-parts strategy, and sea-freight logistics through Port Vila.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代瓦努阿图项目层面的公用事业接受。出口商应为具体逆变器型号准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口报告，记录写入固件的瓦努阿图公用事业或项目设置，并在230/400 V、50 Hz条件下验证保护阈值。由于瓦努阿图是易受气旋影响的太平洋小岛屿发展中国家，调试文件还应记录外壳等级、防腐蚀、浪涌保护、安装、热降额、备件策略，以及经维拉港海运的物流安排。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代萬那杜項目層面的公用事業接受。出口商應為具體逆變器型號準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面報告，記錄寫入韌體的萬那杜公用事業或項目設置，並在230/400 V、50 Hz條件下驗證保護閾值。由於萬那杜是易受氣旋影響的太平洋小島嶼發展中國家，調試文件還應記錄外殼等級、防腐蝕、浪湧保護、安裝、熱降額、備件策略，以及經維拉港海運的物流安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects requiring URA-regulated UNELCO, VUI, utility, EPC, lender, or owner connection review and commissioning acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence supports China domestic grid acceptance but is not transferable to Vanuatu utility or project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not submit China-only GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408-2021 files as a complete Vanuatu grid-connection package. Prepare IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and confirm URA-regulated utility project settings for Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. Vanuatu shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs, so firmware and protection settings should be checked before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将仅限中国的GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408-2021文件作为完整瓦努阿图并网包提交。应准备IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据，并确认适用于瓦努阿图230/400 V、50 Hz电网的URA监管公用事业项目设置。瓦努阿图与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同，因此调试前应检查固件和保护设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將僅限中國的GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408-2021文件作為完整萬那杜併網包提交。應準備IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據，並確認適用於萬那杜230/400 V、50 Hz電網的URA監管公用事業項目設置。萬那杜與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同，因此調試前應檢查韌體和保護設置。
